event_summary: 2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | 2025–2026 Iran–United States negotiations | State media IRNA reports that Iran has sent a proposal for negotiations with the United States to mediators from Pakistan in an effort to end the Iran war.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | 2025–2026 Turkish protests | Turkish police arrest at least 57 people and use tear gas to disperse May Day demonstrators in Istanbul, where authorities block access to Taksim Square to prevent marches.
2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | 2026 Golders Green attack | A 45-year-old man is charged with three counts of attempted murder after attacking three people in London, England, on Wednesday.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | 2026 Iran war | State media IRNA reports that Iran has sent a proposal for negotiations with the United States to mediators from Pakistan in an effort to end the Iran war.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | 2026 Mali attacks | Jihadist group Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin takes over a base outside of Tessalit, Kidal Region, Mali, after it is abandoned by Malian troops and Russia 's Africa Corps.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | 2026 May Day protests | Turkish police arrest at least 57 people and use tear gas to disperse May Day demonstrators in Istanbul, where authorities block access to Taksim Square to prevent marches.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | 2026 United States military buildup in the Middle East | USS Gerald R. Ford officially exits the Middle East after taking part in operations in Iran during the war, leaving only the USS Abraham Lincoln and USS George H. W. Bush in the region.
2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | Al Qaeda | Al Qaeda -linked insurgents call for Malians to rise up against the Mali military junta and transition to Sharia law.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | Alice Springs | Members of Alice Springs ' Aboriginal community in Northern Territory, Australia, clash with police outside a hospital where a man charged with the murder of a five-year-old Warlpiri girl is being treated, demanding the suspect be punished under traditional law. This follows a five-day search for the missing girl with large community participation before she was confirmed dead.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | Amatlán de Cañas | At least eleven people are killed and 31 others are injured when a passenger bus veers off a highway and overturns near Amatlán de Cañas, Nayarit, Mexico.
2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | Balıkesir | Three people are killed and 30 others are injured after a minibus rolls over in Balıkesir, Turkey.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | Crisis in Venezuela | Venezuelan acting president Delcy Rodríguez raises the minimum income package by 26.3% to US$ 240 and increases pensions to $70, as the government responds to protests over low wages amid high inflation.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | Dissident Irish republican campaign | A 66-year-old man is charged with several offences, including terrorism, following a car bombing outside of a police station in Dunmurry, Belfast, Northern Ireland.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | IRNA | State media IRNA reports that Iran has sent a proposal for negotiations with the United States to mediators from Pakistan in an effort to end the Iran war.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps | Fourteen Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps members are killed and two others are injured when an unexploded ordnance detonated in Zanjan province, Iran.
2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | Jammu | Three people are killed and two others are injured when a bridge collapses in Jammu, Jammu and Kashmir, India.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | Jihadist | Jihadist group Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin takes over a base outside of Tessalit, Kidal Region, Mali, after it is abandoned by Malian troops and Russia 's Africa Corps.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | Killing of Kumanjayi Little Baby | Members of Alice Springs ' Aboriginal community in Northern Territory, Australia, clash with police outside a hospital where a man charged with the murder of a five-year-old Warlpiri girl is being treated, demanding the suspect be punished under traditional law. This follows a five-day search for the missing girl with large community participation before she was confirmed dead.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | Mali War | Jihadist group Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin takes over a base outside of Tessalit, Kidal Region, Mali, after it is abandoned by Malian troops and Russia 's Africa Corps.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | May Day | Protests and demonstrations are held worldwide on May Day to call for peace, higher wages and better working conditions. Additionally, protests are held against the Iran war and the global energy and fuel crisis caused by the war. (PBS)

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | Mexican drug war | Rubén Rocha Moya announces he will temporarily step down as governor of Sinaloa, Mexico, after the U.S. files charges alleging links to the Sinaloa Cartel.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | Myanmar civil war | Six civilians are killed and nine more were injured after the military junta bombed a village in Falam Township, Chin State. (BNI) in Burmese
2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | Otjiwarongo | Eleven people are killed after a passenger bus carrying medical staff and patients collided head-on with a truck near Otjiwarongo, Namibia.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | Renters' Rights Act 2025 | The Renters' Rights Act 2025 formally enters force in England, banning Section 21 notices (no-fault evictions), limiting rent increases to once per year, giving tenants the legal right to keep pets, abolishing assured shorthold tenancies, and making it illegal to discriminate against tenants based on them having children, or receiving benefits.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | Rubén Rocha Moya | Rubén Rocha Moya announces he will temporarily step down as governor of Sinaloa, Mexico, after the U.S. files charges alleging links to the Sinaloa Cartel.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | Spain | Spain 's Civil Guard seizes vetween 30,000 to 45,000kg of cocaine on a cargo ship off the Canary Islands in what is the country's largest ever seizure of the illegal drug. Twenty people on board the vessel are arrested.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | Terrorism in the United Kingdom | A 45-year-old man is charged with three counts of attempted murder after attacking three people in London, England, on Wednesday.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | Turkish police | Turkish police arrest at least 57 people and use tear gas to disperse May Day demonstrators in Istanbul, where authorities block access to Taksim Square to prevent marches.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | U.S. | May Day protests are held across the U.S., including an economic blackout as part of 3,500 "May Day Strong" events across the country. Additionally, demonstrations are held outside institutions such as the New York Stock Exchange. (Time)

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | USS Gerald R. Ford | USS Gerald R. Ford officially exits the Middle East after taking part in operations in Iran during the war, leaving only the USS Abraham Lincoln and USS George H. W. Bush in the region.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | Venezuelan | Venezuelan acting president Delcy Rodríguez raises the minimum income package by 26.3% to US$ 240 and increases pensions to $70, as the government responds to protests over low wages amid high inflation.

2026-05-01 | wikipedia_current_events | World War II | A World War II -era German SC250 bomb is safely detonated by the British Army in Plymouth, England, following its discovery on a building site that prompted the emergency evacuation of 1,000 homes.
